data.host: Hostname or IP address of inverter

data_description.host: Note: In case of IP make sure it's static
data_description.port: Note: Port defaults to 502 for MODBUS
data_description.slave: Note: MODBUS slave number is usually 1 for standalone/master inverters and 2 for slave inverters

missing_device_identity.title: Sungrow inverter setup failed
missing_device_identity.description:
The Sungrow integration could not create sensors for `{host}` because the inverter did not provide both a serial number and model.

Serial number: `{serial_number}`
Model: `{model}`
Failure reason: `{reason}`

Check the inverter address, Modbus port, slave number, and that Modbus TCP is enabled. Sensors will not be created until the inverter identity can be read.
